welcome_subtitle: Tap the screen to start your order
dataphone_instruction: Follow the steps on the terminal
dataphone_detail: Tap your card, use your phone, or insert the chip into the physical payment terminal to complete the order.
success_message: We will call you in a moment to deliver your order.
thank_you: Thank you very much for your purchase!
enhance_dish: Enhance your dish with the best extras:
no_additions: This dish has no additions available.
menuLoadError: Error loading the menu. Please try again.
completeProfileSubtitle: Help us get to know you better for your next order.
homeTitle: How would you like to start?
homeReserveSubtitle: Choose date, time and pre-order your menu
homeScanSubtitle: Scan the QR code at your table to order
branchLoadError: Could not load branches. Please try again.
noTimeSlotsAvailable: No time slots available for this date
waiterNotRegistered: You are not registered as a waiter. Contact the administrator.
reservationError: An error occurred while creating your reservation. Please try again.
reservationSuccessSubtitle: We look forward to seeing you at the restaurant
myReservationsSubtitle: You have active reservations. You can book another day.
myReservationsLoadError: Could not load your reservations. Please try again.
editOrderSaveError: Could not save pre-order. Please try again.
cancelReservationMessage: This action cannot be undone. Do you want to cancel your reservation?
cancelReservationError: Could not cancel the reservation. Please try again.
proximityNotifBody: You're near {branchName}. Would you like us to prepare your order now?
confirmAtTableSubtitle: Confirm your arrival so a waiter can validate your order before it goes to the kitchen.
confirmAtTableBtn: I'm at my table, prepare my order
confirmAtTableError: Could not confirm your arrival. Please try again.
confirmAtTableSuccessMessage: A waiter will come to your table to confirm the order. It will then be sent to the kitchen.
confirmAtTableNotFound: The reservation linked to this notification was not found.
confirmAtTableCancelledMessage: This reservation was cancelled and arrival cannot be confirmed.
confirmAtTablePendingMessage: Your reservation has not been confirmed by the restaurant yet. Check the status in My reservations.
confirmAtTablePendingHint: Your reservation is still pending restaurant confirmation, but you can let us know you have arrived so a waiter can come to your table.
confirmAtTableInKitchenMessage: Your order was confirmed by the waiter and is being prepared.
confirmAtTableNoItemsMessage: Add dishes to your pre-order before requesting preparation.
loginWaiterSubtitle: Sign in as a waiter to continue
waiterHomeSubtitle: These are the branch's active reservations. Confirm to send to the kitchen.
waiterNoReservations: There are no active reservations right now.
waiterReservationsLoadError: Could not load reservations. Please try again.
waiterConfirmError: Could not confirm the order. Please try again.
waiterMarkReadyError: Could not mark as ready to pay. Please try again.
waiterEditOrderHint: Adjust dishes with the customer before sending to the kitchen.
waiterEditOrderError: Could not update the pre-order. Please try again.
waiterEditOrderNoValidItems: No valid dishes to save. Wait for the menu to load or add dishes.
cancelReservationWaiterMessage: Customer not coming? You can cancel this reservation. This cannot be undone.
manualOrderSubmitError: Could not create the order. Please try again.
manualOrderEmptyError: Add at least one dish to the order.
tableOrganizerEmptyHint: Tap a palette item to add it, then drag to position it.
readyToPayMarkError: Could not mark as paid. Please try again.
readyToPayEmpty: No tables waiting for payment right now.
